title: Date and Time of Form correct but showing in Board Differently
excerpt: Hi I have created a workform and the date and time on the form is showing correctly but when the information is sent to the monday board its showing incorrectly - I have also done a creating log column and this is correc…

posts.author: Sam1 (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I have created a workform and the date and time on the form is showing correctly but when the information is sent to the monday board its showing incorrectly - I have also done a creating log column and this is correct so why is the date and time not transfering correctly from the workform (on the form its correct though) for instance the creation log is saying 5th May 2024 at 12pm and the form is physically saying the same thing but when the data is populated in the Date colum its saying 5th Many 10pm?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Are the timezone settings the same on the device the form is filled in and on the device you are using to view the board?

posts.author: Sam1 (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes - and the form even has the date and time correctly - its when that is transfered to the board it goes wrong - but the creation log is correct - the item is created when the form is completed

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: What kind of form are you using? As far as I know the standard monday Workforms do not support to add time to a date column. The Creation log always show the time the entry has been made (in local TZ).
